title: Spherical Harmonics for Diffuse Irradiance
description: Explains L2 Spherical Harmonics as an optimal 9-coefficient representation of low-frequency diffuse irradiance that can be evaluated at per-pixel normal direction with 27 multiplies — used in DECIMA, Horizon: Zero Dawn, and virtually every deferred lighting engine. SH probes are the standard representation for baked and runtime-updated diffuse indirect lighting, appearing in both the baked lightmap pipeline and probe-based RTGI systems. Students will project an HDR cubemap into L2 SH coefficients, reconstruct diffuse irradiance from the coefficients in a pixel shader, and measure the error versus the ground-truth cubemap irradiance integral.
